summary: Iteration 10 - Backend Refactor Regression Testing Complete. The backend was refactored from a monolithic server.py (~1,870 lines) into modular routes/models/utils. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). The refactor did NOT break any existing functionality - all API endpoints continue working identically.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials (test@simplifii.com / test123) returns user object with user_id, email, name
GET /api/auth/me with valid session cookie returns user data
GET /api/user/profile with auth returns user profile with university and onboarding status
GET /api/credits/balance with auth returns credits object
GET /api/notifications with auth returns notifications array
GET /api/briefs/history with auth returns array of briefs
POST /api/concept/visualise with auth returns 5 scenes, quiz, related concepts
POST /api/study-buddy/chat with auth and message returns response
POST /api/checkin with auth returns checkin response with mood message
Frontend landing page loads with login form and 9 tool cards
Dashboard shows all 9 tools including Concept Visualiser
Accessibility toolbar with 5 buttons visible (Text, Dyslexia, Contrast, Motion, More)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor successfully split server.py into 8 route files (auth, briefs, tools, payments, user, planner, chat, notifications)
3 utility files created (auth.py, pdf.py, llm.py) for shared functionality
models.py contains all Pydantic models in one place
All routes use consistent /api prefix via APIRouter(prefix='/api')
Auth helper get_current_user properly imported and used across all protected routes
Cookie-based session auth working correctly with session_token cookie
Minor console warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering' in React - cosmetic, not functional

success_rate.backend: 100% (32/32 tests passed - 12 from iteration9 + 20 regression tests)

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions
mocked_apis.LLM Tools: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (Claude Sonnet 4.5) - returns actual AI-generated content

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 complete. Backend refactor from monolithic server.py to modular routes verified. All 8 route files (auth, briefs, tools, payments, user, planner, chat, notifications) working correctly. All endpoints maintain same request/response formats. Cookie-based auth with session_token cookie. All 9 tools accessible from Dashboard and Landing page. Accessibility toolbar with 5 buttons functional.

new_structure.routes/auth.py: Auth endpoints (login, register, logout, session, me)
new_structure.routes/tools.py: Rubric, essay, humaniser, scaffolder, concept visualiser, jargon, translation

refactor_verification.status: VERIFIED - All endpoints working identically to pre-refactor
